samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register, 0 to 16.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="i">
            <description>Shift count register updated on the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <true id="rst_n" value="0"><action>Set the shift count register (i) to 0.</action></true>
                <true id="start" value="1"><action>Increment the shift count register (i) by 1.</action></true>
                <true id="i" value="17"><action>Reset the shift count register (i) to 0.</action></true>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="done_r">
            <description>Multiplication completion flag updated on the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <true id="rst_n" value="0"><action>Set the completion flag (done_r) to 0.</action></true>
                <true id="i" value="16"><action>Set the completion flag (done_r) to 1.</action></true>
                <true id="i" value="17"><action>Reset the completion flag (done_r) to 0.</action></true>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic id="shift_acc">
            <description>Shift and accumulate operation performed when the shift count register (i) is greater than 0.</description>
            <condition>
                <true id="rst_n" value="0"><action>Reset the multiplicand register (areg), multiplier register (breg), and product register (yout_r) to 0.</action></true>
                <true id="start" value="1"><action>Set the multiplicand register (areg) to the multiplicand input (ain) and the multiplier register (breg) to the multiplier input (bin).</action></true>
                <true id="i" value="[1-16]"><action>
                    <description>When the bit at position i-1 in the multiplicand register (areg) is high, accumulate the multiplier register (breg) into the product register (yout_r) by shifting it left by i-1 positions and appending 0 bits at the least significant bit positions.</description>
                    <action>Set the product register (yout_r) to the sum of the product register (yout_r) and the shifted multiplier register (breg).</action>
                </action></true>
            </condition>
        </combinational_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Reset the registers and perform the shift and accumulate operation based on the shift count.</implementation>
</module>
